name: python3-cairo
title: python3-cairo
summary: Python3 bindings for the Cairo vector graphics library
description:
Python3 bindings for the Cairo vector graphics library
This package contains modules that allow you to use the Cairo vector
graphics library in Python3 programs.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-cairo because Python3 bindings for the Cairo vector graphics library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-cairo as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-cairo with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-cairo --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
